---
title: "RESUME/CV"
toc: true
---

I am currently open for work. Please feel free to reach out about projects, internships, employment opportunities, -- I love collaborating and connecting with others on projects and ideas -- or even just to say hello! 

<p class="center-text">You can also view my resume [here {{< fa file-pdf title= "pdf" >}}](mzhaoresume.pdf), and my CV [here {{< fa file-pdf title= "pdf" >}}](mzhao-cv2026.pdf)</p>


<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; width: 100%;">
<div class="pdf-container">
  <embed src="mzhaoresume.pdf" type="application/pdf" class="pdf-viewer" width="100%" height="800px">
  <embed src="mzhao-cv2026.pdf" type="application/pdf" class="pdf-viewer" width="100%" height="800px">
</div>
